title: L64 - work_service_runs
description: Service runtime execution instances — child records of service requests (L63). Each run represents an actual execution attempt of a service, with timing, status, output, and error tracking. Feeds performance profiles (L65) and SLO breach detection (L67).

request_id.description: FK to L63 work_service_requests (CASCADE on delete). Which request this run fulfills.

work_unit_id.description: FK to L52 work_execution_units (SET_NULL on delete). Work unit created for this service run (optional linkage for provenance).

completed_at.description: When this run completed (successfully or with error)

duration_seconds.description: Calculated duration (completed_at - started_at) in seconds. Nullable if not yet completed.

output_payload.description: Service output data (must conform to service.output_schema from L62). Nullable until run completes.

error_details.description: Error information if status=failed or timeout. { error_code, error_message, stack_trace, retryable }

retry_attempt.description: Attempt number for this request (1 = first attempt, 2+ = retries)

resource_consumption.description: Resource usage metrics for this run (CPU time, memory, tokens, cost, etc.)

trace_ids.description: FK array to L32 traces. LLM call traces for this run (if service uses LLM).

evidence_ids.description: FK array to L31 evidence. Evidence artifacts produced by this run.

notes.description: Additional execution notes or debugging context

created_by.description: Identifier of creator (typically the service runtime itself)
